hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && ! echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.test\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npm run lint -- --no-warn-ignored && npm run typecheck; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.test\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npm test; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
bash scripts/update-quality.sh 2>/dev/null && git add docs/QUALITY.md 2>/dev/null || true

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"CRITICAL CONTEXT TO PRESERVE ACROSS COMPACTION:

## Architecture
5-layer model: Types → Data → Transform → API → UI. See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.

## Workflow
After completing work: commit → push feature branch → create PR → wait CI → merge → pull main. Do ALL steps automatically.

## Current Quality
8/8 lib modules tested, 74 unit tests, 7 E2E tests. Quality gate blocks untested modules.

## Key Files
- CLAUDE.md: agent knowledge map
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: layer definitions
- .claude/settings.json: hooks config
- scripts/check-quality.sh + check-layers.sh: CI gates"}}'
